history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands in front of a cascading waterfall, posing with arms crossed and thumbs up. They are wearing a white jacket with black stripes on the sleeves, light-colored cargo shorts, a pink and white checkered baseball cap, and white sunglasses. The waterfall plunges into a clear, turquoise pool of water. Lush green moss and vegetation cover the rocky cliffs behind the waterfall. The lighting is bright and natural, suggesting it's daytime. The overall mood is cool and adventurous. The style of the image is a vibrant, high-resolution photograph.
